info.title: Apollo.io API
info.description: Apollo.io REST API for sales intelligence and engagement. Search and enrich people and organizations, manage contacts, accounts, deals, sequences, tasks, and calls.

tags.name: People Search
tags.description: Search for people in Apollo database

post.description: Find people in the Apollo database. Does not consume credits. Does not return emails or phone numbers - use enrichment endpoints for that. Display limit of 50,000 records (100 per page, up to 500 pages).
Enrich data for a single person. Consumes credits. Use reveal_personal_emails and reveal_phone_number parameters to retrieve contact info.
Enrich data for up to 10 people in a single call. Rate limited to 50% of single enrichment rate.
Find companies in the Apollo database. Display limit of 50,000 records.

get.description: Enrich data for a single company.

post.description: Enrich data for up to 10 companies in a single call.
Search for contacts that have been added to your team's Apollo account.
Add contacts to an existing sequence. Requires a master API key.

get.summary: Get a list of email accounts
get.description: Get a list of email accounts

get.summary: Get a list of all custom fields
get.description: Get a list of all custom fields

post.summary: View API usage stats and rate limits
post.description: View API usage stats and rate limits
